user_query:
Please run a thorough code review of our App Intents implementation and produce both a structured JSON checklist and a plain-English report with prioritized fixes.

What to review (read all files under input/):
- input/ProjectContext.md — target OS versions and packaging context
- input/LibraryIntents.txt — several AppIntent types and perform() implementations
- input/Entities.txt — AppEntity and query types used for disambiguation
- input/Parameters.txt — parameter declarations and DynamicOptionsProvider code
- input/ShortcutsProvider.txt — AppShortcutsProvider and example phrases
- input/LocalizationNotes.md — where phrases/localization strings are placed

Deliverables (write all files under output/):
1) output/review.json — JSON findings using this exact schema and keys:
{
  "ios_target_min": "string",                            // e.g., "iOS 16"
  "perform_mainactor_violation": true|false,              // UI/main-thread work without @MainActor
  "perform_timeout_risk": true|false,                     // long-running work that risks 30s timeout; note if openAppWhenRun should be set
  "custom_error_localization_missing": true|false,        // throws without CustomLocalizedStringResourceConvertible
  "swiftdata_persistent_id_issue": true|false,            // passes @Model directly instead of persistentModelID
  "entity_query_voice_input_issue": true|false,           // uses EntityQuery where voice input requires EntityStringQuery
  "suggested_entities_missing": true|false,               // suggestedEntities() empty or unhelpful
  "entity_id_stability_issue": true|false,                // non-persistent IDs (e.g., UUID() per instantiation)
  "dependency_injection_in_query": true|false,            // @Dependency used in queries (Siri context)
  "nonoptional_parameter_missing_default": true|false,    // required @Parameter without default or requestValue
  "parameter_dependency_ios16_guard_missing": true|false, // @IntentParameterDependency used without iOS 17+ guard when min is iOS 16
  "shortcuts_phrases_missing_app_name": true|false,       // phrases missing .applicationName
  "shortcuts_localization_wrong_file": true|false,        // phrases localized in wrong file (e.g., Localizable.strings)
  "appintents_in_swift_package_pre17": true|false,        // intents in Swift Package with pre-iOS 17 target
  "openAppWhenRun_missing_for_long_ops": true|false,      // long tasks without openAppWhenRun
  "critical_findings": ["string", ...]                   // human-readable list of top issues and why they matter
}
Populate all fields above based on the code you review.

2) output/review.md — a detailed report that:
- Maps each finding to concrete code references from input/* and explains impact and exact fixes
- Includes a checklist covering: perform() threading and timeout, error handling, entity query type, suggestedEntities defaults, entity ID stability, SwiftData persistentModelID usage, parameter defaults/dynamic options, @IntentParameterDependency availability, Siri discovery and phrase rules, localization file placement, and app/extension packaging nuances
- Provides specific code-level fix snippets (e.g., switch to EntityStringQuery, add @MainActor, guard @IntentParameterDependency with availability, include .applicationName in phrases, move phrases to AppShortcuts.strings, use persistentModelID, avoid @Dependency in queries)

3) output/fixes.md — a prioritized implementation plan grouped by P0 (must fix to avoid crashes/UX breakage), P1, and P2. Each item should be an actionable step with owner-ready descriptions.

Make sure the JSON is valid, and the markdown files are clear and specific. If you need to assume intent behavior for ambiguous areas, call it out with a note referencing the relevant Apple guideline.
